mapper.select: SELECT /* @SQLID=SUB0202_0601-01#Sql001 */ BM.BANK_CODE AS BANK_CODE ,BM.BRANCH_CODE AS BANK_BRANCH_CODE ,BM.BANK_NAME_KANJI AS BANK_KANJI ,BM.BRANCH_NAME_KANJI AS BANK_BRANCH_KANJI ,MU.UAI_BANK_DEPOSIT_CLASS AS BANK_DEPOSIT_CLASS ,MU.UAI_BANK_ACCOUNT AS BANK_ACCOUNT ,MU.UAI_BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME AS BANK_ACCOUNT_NAME FROM ETRADE.ETJP_BANK_MASTER@CORDYS_ET10.WORLD BM INNER JOIN CORDYS.MEDIATE_USER_ATTRIBUTE_INFO MU ON MU.UAI_BANK_CODE = BM.BANK_CODE AND MU.UAI_BANK_BRANCH_CODE = BM.BRANCH_CODE WHERE MU.CUSTOMER_ID = #{req.customerCode}
